description_long: This is a large, dark wood-finished filing cabinet with a rectangular top and a sturdy, modern design. The left side features a vertical stack of four spacious drawers, each equipped with a metallic bar handle for easy access. On the right side, there is an open shelf compartment above a closed cabinet, providing versatile storage options for documents, office supplies, or equipment. The surface is flat and broad, suitable for placing office items such as computers, printers, or decor. The wood grain texture is visible throughout, giving the cabinet a sophisticated and professional appearance. The overall construction appears robust, making it suitable for high-traffic urban environments like offices or public service areas.
description: A large, dark wood-finished filing cabinet with four drawers, an open shelf, and a closed cabinet, featuring metallic bar handles and a flat, sturdy top.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth and wood grain texture, with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_1: Front view displaying four drawers with metallic handles on the left, an open shelf, and a closed cabinet on the right.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the depth and solid wood paneling.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back panels of the cabinet, with no visible drawers, handles, or open compartments.
